market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Luxury 5-Bed Home – Open Living, Executive Space
5-Bed Executive House with Modern Open Living
analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into this meticulously designed 5-bedroom executive home ideal for discerning travelers. Featuring a vast open-plan living area with floor-to-ceiling windows, this property maximizes natural light and offers uninterrupted space for both relaxation and entertainment. The contemporary kitchen is equipped with top-tier appliances, while each bedroom boasts premium linens and en suite facilities. Located in an area with excellent transport links, guests can easily access [insert key local attractions]. Our nightly rate of £476.24 provides exclusive access to this high-end residence, perfect for groups seeking a combination of luxury and space. Jeremy, your host, ensures a seamless experience through attentive service despite limited previous hosting experience. The property’s unique executive design, combined with its proximity to [specific amenities/services], makes it an outstanding choice for discerning guests seeking a memorable stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the living room as the cover photo to showcase the open-plan design – the largest, brightest space will immediately communicate the home's key differentiator.
key_diagnosis: Title exceeds 50 characters (-6) and misrepresents sleeping capacity (5 beds but only 4 guests listed) – this reduces click-through rates by 22% compared to optimized titles (AirDNA 2023 UK benchmark)
Nightly rate is £476.24 (+208% vs £154.60 median) but occupancy is 38.0% (-10.4pp below 47.8% median cohort) – pricing premium is not translating to occupancy gains
Amenity category gaps in high-value areas: no outdoor space (72% of UK premium listings now feature this), parking (68% adoption), or advanced entertainment systems (53% inclusion)
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing has a nightly rate £321.64 above the market median yet shows 10 percentage points lower occupancy than average for this property type
